words.definition_vi: đạt được tiến bộ, tiến triển trong công việc hoặc học tập
words.definition_en: to advance or improve in a task, project, or learning process
words.example_sentence: The students made significant progress in their English skills after attending the intensive course.

words.definition_vi: nâng cao nhận thức, giúp mọi người hiểu biết hơn về một vấn đề
words.definition_en: to increase public knowledge or understanding of an issue
words.example_sentence: Environmental organizations are raising awareness about climate change through social media campaigns.

words.definition_vi: tạo ra mối đe dọa, gây nguy hiểm cho ai/cái gì
words.definition_en: to present a danger or risk to someone or something
words.example_sentence: Invasive species pose a serious threat to the biodiversity of native ecosystems.

words.definition_vi: tiến hành nghiên cứu, thực hiện các hoạt động khoa học để tìm hiểu
words.definition_en: to carry out systematic investigation or study on a topic
words.example_sentence: Scientists conduct research on renewable energy sources to develop sustainable solutions.

words.definition_vi: rút ra kết luận, đưa ra nhận định dựa trên bằng chứng
words.definition_en: to make a judgment or decision based on evidence or reasoning
words.example_sentence: Based on the experimental data, researchers drew the conclusion that the new treatment was effective.

words.definition_vi: thực hiện hành động, bắt tay vào làm gì đó
words.definition_en: to do something in response to a situation or problem
words.example_sentence: The government took action to reduce pollution by implementing stricter environmental regulations.

words.definition_vi: đạt được thành công, hoàn thành mục tiêu
words.definition_en: to accomplish a goal or reach a desired outcome
words.example_sentence: Through hard work and dedication, the team achieved success in launching their innovative product.

words.definition_vi: cung cấp bằng chứng, đưa ra dữ liệu để chứng minh
words.definition_en: to supply facts, data, or proof to support a claim or argument
words.example_sentence: The study provides evidence that regular exercise improves mental health significantly.

words.definition_vi: giải quyết vấn đề, xử lý tình huống khó khăn
words.definition_en: to deal with or find a solution to a difficulty or issue
words.example_sentence: The government must address the problem of unemployment by creating more job opportunities.

words.definition_vi: duy trì sự cân bằng, giữ ổn định
words.definition_en: to keep something in a stable or equal state
words.example_sentence: Students need to maintain balance between academic work and extracurricular activities.

words.definition_vi: đặt ra mục tiêu, xác định điều muốn đạt được
words.definition_en: to establish a specific objective or target to achieve
words.example_sentence: The company set a goal to reduce carbon emissions by fifty percent within five years.

words.definition_vi: thực hiện kế hoạch, thi hành những gì đã lên kế hoạch
words.definition_en: to execute or implement a predetermined strategy or scheme
words.example_sentence: The project manager carried out the plan efficiently, ensuring all deadlines were met.

words.definition_vi: đi đến quyết định, đưa ra lựa chọn sau khi cân nhắc
words.definition_en: to arrive at a choice or determination after consideration
words.example_sentence: After careful deliberation, the committee reached a decision to approve the new policy.

words.definition_vi: gây ra thiệt hại, làm hư hỏng
words.definition_en: to inflict harm or injury to something or someone
words.example_sentence: The hurricane caused significant damage to the coastal communities and infrastructure.

words.definition_vi: cung cấp hỗ trợ, giúp đỡ ai đó
words.definition_en: to provide assistance or help to someone in need
words.example_sentence: International organizations offer support to developing countries in building sustainable infrastructure.

words.definition_vi: cần sự chú ý, đòi hỏi được quan tâm
words.definition_en: to need or demand focus and care
words.example_sentence: Mental health issues require attention from both healthcare professionals and society as a whole.

words.definition_vi: thúc đẩy phát triển, giúp cái gì phát triển
words.definition_en: to encourage or advance growth and improvement
words.example_sentence: Education promotes development by equipping individuals with skills and knowledge for better futures.

words.definition_vi: tạo ra thu nhập, kiếm được tiền
words.definition_en: to produce or create revenue or earnings
words.example_sentence: Small businesses generate income by providing services that meet local community needs.

words.definition_vi: giảm lượng khí thải, hạ thấp chất ô nhiễm phát ra
words.definition_en: to decrease the amount of gases or pollutants released into the atmosphere
words.example_sentence: Countries are working together to reduce emissions and combat the effects of global warming.

words.definition_vi: nâng cao chất lượng, cải thiện mức độ tốt
words.definition_en: to improve or increase the standard or excellence of something
words.example_sentence: The company invested in new technology to enhance the quality of its products and services.

words.definition_vi: thiết lập mối liên hệ, tạo ra sự kết nối
words.definition_en: to create a link or relationship between two or more things
words.example_sentence: The research established a connection between poor sleep habits and decreased academic performance.

words.definition_vi: đáp ứng yêu cầu, hoàn thành điều kiện cần thiết
words.definition_en: to satisfy or complete a necessary condition or demand
words.example_sentence: Students must fulfill all graduation requirements before receiving their diplomas.

questions.question_text: The environmental organization has been _______ about the dangers of plastic pollution through educational campaigns and social media.
questions.explanation: Cụm từ đúng là 'raise awareness' (nâng cao nhận thức). 'Make awareness', 'take awareness', 'give awareness' không phải là collocations tự nhiên trong tiếng Anh.

questions.question_text: Scientists _______ extensive research to understand how climate change affects marine ecosystems.
questions.explanation: 'Conduct research' là collocation chính thức và tự nhiên nhất. 'Make research' không đúng; 'do research' và 'perform research' có thể dùng nhưng 'conduct' là lựa chọn tốt nhất trong ngữ cảnh học thuật.

questions.question_text: The new factory regulations _______ a serious threat to small manufacturing businesses in the region.
questions.explanation: 'Pose a threat' là collocation chuẩn. Mặc dù 'create' và 'present' cũng có thể dùng, nhưng 'pose' là động từ chính xác nhất với 'threat'.

questions.question_text: Despite facing numerous obstacles, the team _______ significant progress in developing the new software.
questions.explanation: 'Make progress' là collocation phổ biến và tự nhiên. 'Achieved progress' không đúng; 'took progress' và 'gained progress' không phải collocations tiêu chuẩn.

questions.question_text: The government _______ immediate action to address the rising unemployment rate in urban areas.
questions.explanation: 'Take action' là collocation chuẩn. 'Made action', 'did action', 'performed action' không phải cách nói tự nhiên trong tiếng Anh.

questions.question_text: The study _______ strong evidence that regular physical activity reduces the risk of heart disease.
questions.explanation: 'Provide evidence' là collocation chính thức trong ngữ cảnh học thuật. 'Shows', 'gives', 'presents' có thể dùng nhưng 'provide' là lựa chọn tốt nhất.

questions.question_text: The committee _______ a decision to implement new policies aimed at improving workplace safety.
questions.explanation: 'Reach a decision' là collocation tự nhiên. 'Made a decision' cũng đúng nhưng 'reach' là lựa chọn tốt hơn trong ngữ cảnh chính thức. 'Took a decision' và 'came a decision' không đúng.

questions.question_text: The hurricane _______ extensive damage to coastal infrastructure and displaced thousands of residents.
questions.explanation: 'Cause damage' là collocation chuẩn. 'Made damage', 'created damage', 'brought damage' không phải cách nói tự nhiên.

questions.question_text: International organizations _______ financial and technical support to developing nations for infrastructure projects.
questions.explanation: 'Offer support' là collocation tự nhiên. 'Provide support' cũng đúng nhưng 'offer' là lựa chọn tốt hơn. 'Give support' và 'deliver support' ít tự nhiên hơn.

questions.question_text: The research _______ a clear connection between social media usage and increased anxiety in teenagers.
questions.explanation: 'Establish a connection' là collocation chính thức. 'Showed', 'found' có thể dùng nhưng 'establish' là lựa chọn tốt nhất cho 'connection'.

questions.question_text: The company _______ ambitious goals to become carbon-neutral by 2030 and reduce waste significantly.
questions.explanation: 'Set a goal' là collocation chuẩn. 'Made goals', 'established goals', 'created goals' không phải cách nói tự nhiên với 'goal'.

questions.question_text: The new technology _______ the quality of medical services by enabling faster diagnosis and treatment.
questions.explanation: 'Enhance quality' là collocation tự nhiên trong ngữ cảnh chính thức. 'Improved quality' cũng đúng nhưng 'enhance' là lựa chọn tốt hơn. 'Increased quality' và 'raised quality' ít tự nhiên hơn.
